_comment: Scenarios for the programmatic eval suite. Each entry maps to a grader function in grade.ts by id. Cover trigger precision (should-fire, should-skip), widget shape correctness, and payload encoding.

evals.prompt: Draft three Linear issues for the telemetry audit follow-ups: a p99 latency alert, a backfill of missing trace IDs, and a latency dashboard. Let me edit before you save them.
evals.description: Multi-issue draft request with an explicit edit-before-save intent. Should activate.

evals.prompt: Draft a Linear issue to track a spike on ingestion lag during deploys, I want to tweak the description before you save it.
evals.description: Single-issue draft request with edit-before-save intent. Should activate.

evals.prompt: Queue up tickets for the auth migration so I can review them: the session token storage change, the middleware swap, and the cookie expiry update.
evals.description: Multi-issue review intent without the word 'edit'. Should still activate.

evals.prompt: Look at SAPP-1234 and let's edit the description to make the out-of-scope clearer.
evals.description: Substantive edit to the description of an existing Linear issue. Should activate, fetch SAPP-1234 first, and render the widget with linear_id set.

evals.prompt: Just create a Linear issue titled 'Bump pnpm to 10.11' with body 'Run pnpm install -r and update lockfile' and save it now.
evals.description: Explicit one-shot save with no review step. Should skip.

evals.prompt: Find me all the open Linear issues assigned to me in the SAPP team.
Change the title of SAPP-3596 to 'Spike: investigate ingestion lag' please.
evals.description: Single-field edit on an existing issue. Should skip.
